item.name: First Feastfish
item.description:
A vaguely egg-shaped freshwater fish found in the depths of Karvarhur the First.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: According to legend, a member of this species was the very first morsel consumed by the ancient Yok Huy progenitor. Given this wavekin's high nutritional value, one can commend the giant's decision after emerging─presumably famished─from the primordial lake.
